QE-01.question: What percentage of the U.S. business will you own?

QE-03.question: Will you have any business partners?
options: No — I am the sole owner

QE-04.question: What percentage will your partner(s) own?

QE-05.question: Will any partner also apply for E-2 status?
options: No — partner is a U.S. citizen or resident
No — partner will not be in the U.S.

QE-06.question: What will your official title be in the business?

QE-07.question: Will you have authority to hire and terminate employees?

QE-08.question: Will you be responsible for day-to-day operational decisions?
options: No — I will focus on strategy only

QE-09.question: Will you have authority to sign contracts and financial commitments on behalf of the business?

QE-10.question: What is the legal structure of the U.S. business?

QE-11.question: In which U.S. state is or will the business be registered?

QE-12.question: Has the business entity been formed yet?

QE-13.question: What is the exact legal name of the U.S. business entity?
